scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

Score 1VP for each Friendly Unit that ends the Round within an Enemy Deployment Zone.

Score 2VPs for each Friendly Unit that ends the Round in a Friendly Deployment Zone that previously ended a Round within an Enemy Deployment Zone. After scoring in this way, the Unit may not score this again until they return to an Enemy Deployment Zone again.

additionalConditions.stringValue: Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue:
each end of the round after any normal step, lava flows at ground level, every unit at ground level is destroyed.

special action: immediately before lava flows, you can do an additional movement phase (each unit activate in this way skip their next movement phase)

hints: you must set up a proper map that allows areas with ground level >0

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Retrieval: If you control your active Mission Marker, you may reposition it up to 3" from its previous location.

Sergeant: Activate your Mission Marker as part of a Friendly Unit's activation (within 3" of the marker) in the Assault Phase: it performs an Attack with the following profile:

RNG 12", TGT All, RoA 3, Hit 3+, Surge (Light D3), DMG 1

Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue: Mission Markers 1 and 2 are Activated.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

Score 2VPs for controlling each active Mission Marker.

Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

Start of the Round (2-5): For each activated Controlled Mission Marker, gain 2 VPs.

missionParams.stringValue:
Start of the Game: All mission markers are activated.

Start of the Round (1-4): 
Randomly determine one Activated Mission Marker and flip it to its Deactivated Side.
Starting with the player with priority: Each player, Choose one enemy unit not controlling or contesting a mission marker, place that enemy unit back into reserves.

Game Round 5: All mission markers are activated.

additionalConditions.stringValue: Special winning conditions: The game ends immediately if aa Player leads by 10+ VPs

missionParams.stringValue:
3-Player FFA. 700 Minerals per player.                                                                                                                                                        
  36"x36" board. Custom deployment (no Deployment Card).                                                                                                                                        
  Place ★ at board center. Place 3 Markers 9" from ★, one toward each Deployment Zone.                                                                                                          
  Pick one table edge. P1 deploys in the left 12", P2 in the right 12" (both 6" deep, 12" gap between them). P3 deploys centered on the opposite edge (12" wide, 6" deep). 
Roll off for zone choice.                                                                                                                                                                                       
  Roll for Priority each round (2D6). Alternate activations clockwise.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Temple Dominance: Control ★ 3 consecutive rounds to win.
  Sudden Death: 8+ VP lead over both opponents ends the game.
  Eliminated player's Markers become Neutral.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.
  Controlling ★ grants 3 VP.
  1 VP per other Marker you Control.
  If no player Controls ★, all players gain 1 VP.

Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.
From the Start of the First Round:
The player who destroys the Capital Ship gains 5 VPs.
Other Mission Markers grant 1 VP when controlled.

additionalConditions.stringValue: Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue:
All Mission Markers are Activated.
Mission Marker 5 is the central objective and represents a Capital Ship with 20 Hit Points, Armor 4+, and the tags Mechanical, Armored, Flying. It can be attacked and destroyed.

Repair Capital Ship: When a player activates a unit within 3" of a Mission Marker, they may spend 1 PE, CP, or BM to restore 1 Hit Point to the ship.
-This can be done a number of times per round equal to the Mission Markers they control.
-If a player controls Mission Marker 5, the repair restores D3 Hit Points instead.
All Red and Blue Mission Markers are Activated.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Turret: Mission Markers have the following stats:

Armor: 3+, HP: 6, Special Rules: Tough (1), Tags: Structure, Mechanical (Zerg: Biological), Ground

Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

Score 1VP for each Wound dealt to an Enemy Mission Marker.

missionParams.stringValue:
Before the game begins, place a single Objective Marker as close to the center of the board as possible; this is the Extraction Point.

Players roll off, the winner may choose to be the Attacker or Defender.

At the start of the first round, the Defender must place half their supply (rounding up) on the board as close as possible to wholly within 6" of the Extraction Point. All these units count as activated in the Movement Phase of Round 1.

Players proceed with Round 1 in an otherwise normal fashion; if the Defender's units placed in the center of the board do not exceed the supply cap, they may bring units on, alternating with the Attacker as in a normal mission.

scoringConditions.stringValue: The player who controls the Extraction Point at the end of the game is the winner.

missionParams.stringValue:
Before the game begins, players should roll off; the winner may choose to be the Attacker or Defender.
Players should then note which two objective markers are farthest away from the Attacker's entry edge; these will be Large Mineral Deposits, all other objective markers will be Small Mineral Deposits.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
At the start of the game, the Defender scores 25 Victory Points.

At the end of each round, the Attacker scores 2 Victory Points for each Large Mineral Deposit they hold and 1 Victory Point for each Small Mineral Deposit they hold. For each point the Attacker gains in this way, the Defender loses 1 Victory Point.

Any Mineral Deposits held by the Defender at the end of the game are worth 1 Victory Point each.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
In the Scoring and Cleanup Phase, going in Objective Number order, the Player who controls that objective may select an Enemy Unit within 6" of that objective (or 12" if it is the neutral Mission Marker): the Unit suffers 3 Hits (1).

Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue: All Mission Markers are Activated.

At the end of the Round, if a Scout Unit is within 3" of an objective, it gains 1VP token. VP tokens are added to your VPs when a Scout Unit ends the Round within a Friendly Deployment Zone.

A single Red and Blue Mission Marker is Activated (Player chooses). All others are deactivated.
One Unit (Supply 2 or Less) from your force starts the game deployed in base contact with your active Mission Marker.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Lost Unit: The unit deployed in base contact with your active Mission Marker is your lost unit. It activates like a normal unit, and may move, attack, and react normally, except that they may never be placed back into reserves.

Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 10+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue:
All Mission Markers are Activated.

Computer Mission markers:
-Each objective has 4 Hit Points, Armor 5+, and is considered Armored, Ground.
-If an objective is reduced to 0 Hit Points, it is Deactivated.
-Objectives can be attacked at a maximum range of 6".
-Players cannot attack their own objective tokens.
-Objective 5 always remains neutral.

At the start of each Cleanup & Refresh phase, all deactivated objectives are re-activated.

additionalConditions.stringValue: Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue:
All Mission Markers are Activated.
Mission Markers : Each objective has 6 Hit Points, Arm 5+, and is considered Light Ground.
-Players cannot attack their own or neutral objectives.
-If an objective reaches 0 Hit Points, it becomes Deactivated.
-Objective 5 is the only objective that can be controlled by players. When controlled, it counts as that player’s objective for all rules.
-At the start of each Cleanup & Refresh Phase, all Deactivated objectives are restored to full Hit Points.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Apprehend: When a Hero Unit is reduced to 0 Wounds, it becomes a Hero Token: it remains where it fell, and is treated as a Mission Marker. At the end of each Round, the player controlling a Hero Token may move it up to 3".

Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue:
All Mission Markers are Deactivated.

When a Hero Unit is reduced to 0 Wounds, do not remove the model from the board: it becomes a token instead.

Score 2VPs if you control the Neutral Mission Marker and controlled it last Round.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
The Artifact: If the player that controls the Artifact is losing in VPs at the start of Rounds 3 or 4, they may activate the Artifact's psionic powers: all Enemy Units within 3" of the Neutral Mission Marker suffer 3 Hits (1).

Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue: each players squad list is 1k points. they form 2 squads, so for each color squad we have a 2k mixed armies. Starting supply counter is divided by 2 for each player. the total availability supply is always divided by 2 for each squadron (e.g. 8 at round 2 = 4 supply for each player, each squadron limit is 8)

missionParams.stringValue:
During Round 1, no Charge or Combat Phase is possible.
During Round 2, all rules are normal.
At the Start of Round 3, all Mission Markers become Activated.

For Round 1 and Round 2 only: At the Score and Cleanup Phase, if a Unit is within Range of a Mission Marker (active or not), that Unit recovers 1 Hit Point. Mission Marker 5 instead recovers 1D3 Hit Points.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
From the Start of Round 3:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.
Gain 1 VP for each Controlled Mission Marker.

- At the end of the round player who controls the Center Token scores "X" points, where "X" is the current round counter.
- When you wound enemy models that control the Center Token, you score points equal to supply your enemy lost.

missionParams.stringValue: The Center Token must be placed 2 levels above the level of deployment ground.

additionalConditions.stringValue: This Mission Card is designed for custom deployment map called "King of the Hill".

Turret: Mission Markers have the following stats:

Armor: 3+, HP: 6, Special Rules: Tough (1), Tags: Structure, Mechanical (Zerg: Biological), Ground

missionParams.stringValue:
Each player must begin by choosing one of the map squares to place their miniatures using a die to randomly select one of the 6 available locations on the map (if there are fewer than 6 players, they can deploy all their miniatures in one or more squares according to their strategy).FFA, 2v2 and 3v3 (Max 6 Players)

All units destroyed are returned to Reserves.
All Mission Markers are Activated.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 15+ VPs or a Player doesn't have any units.
If there is no winner after the sixth round, an additional round is played with double damage until only one player remains.

Gain 5 VPs for each Enemy Team's Flag returned to within 3" of original Team's Entry Edge. Flag is then reset to original starting location.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
When within 3" of unheld Enemy Flag, take possession of Flag with that Player's Unit. You cannot pick Flag up more than once a Phase with the same Unit.

If a Unit possessing Enemy Flag loses any model, drop the Enemy's Flag next to that Unit. Any Enemy Flag dropped & not picked back up is reset at End of Round.

You cannot return to Reserves when in possession of Enemy Flag.

missionParams.stringValue:
No Mission Markers are Activated.

Choose one Mission Marker closest to that Team's original Entry Edge as that Team's Flag Location & place a Token to represent the Flag.

The Neutral Mission Marker is Activated.

In this scenario, the Blue Player is the Defender and the Red Player is the Attacker.

additionalConditions.stringValue:

Armor: 3+, HP: 8, Tags: Mechanical (Zerg: Biological), Ground, Structure

The Attacker scores 1VP per Wound caused to the Neutral Mission Parker this Round.
The Defender scores 2VPs this Round if the Neutral Mission Marker has not been destroyed.

missionParams.stringValue:
Players should roll off; the winner chooses whether to be the Attacker or Defender.

The Attacker uses one of the entry edges listed on the chosen deployment map. The Defender's Entry Edge is a point at the center of the board.

At the end of each round, give every Defender unit on the board that is wholly within 12" of the center of the board, 1 Uplink Point.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
At the end of each round, any Defender unit that is touching a table edge and is unengaged, may be removed from the board. Any unit removed in such a way scores the Defender 1 Victory Point for each Uplink Point they had.

Whenever a Defender unit is destroyed, the Attacker scores 1 Victory Point for each Uplink Point the Defender unit had. If that unit was destroyed in Melee, the Attacker scores double the number of Victory Points.

missionParams.stringValue:
Hero units are not allowed.
Your mission is to make it to the Pick-Up zone, which is the high ground in the center of the battlefield (for narrative purposes until terrain is released or you make your own).
Place the Neutral Objective Marker in the Center (on high ground).

additionalConditions.stringValue: Your forces have been separated from their COs; but, in the distance, you notice the high ground, with a enough surface area at the top to server as a pick-up zone, not all of your units will make it, but one player will...

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score +1VP equal to enemy supply destroyed in MELEE combat.
Score +2VP equal to enemy supply destroyed w/ RANGED attacks.
The Neutral Objective Marker is activated in rounds 2 to 5.
The NOM will award +1VP from rounds 2 to 4
In the final round the NOM will award Victory (Rescue) to the player who controls it; if the players tie at this point; the opposing forces will fight to the death for rescue; and the player with a higher supply value will be rescued.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Command: Any Hero Unit may command a Friendly Unit in the Movement Phase to attack an Enemy Unit you select: the commanded unit gains additional scoring potential when it attacks the specified Enemy Unit.

Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

additionalConditions.stringValue: Optional. Some or all of the miner squads can be placed in a structure to prevent direct fire.

missionParams.stringValue: You have received a distress transmission from a mining site. The Kel-Morian combine has a stranded team of miners in need of emergency evacuation.

scoringConditions.stringValue: Each objective marker has a squad of 3 civilian miners  proxy models. The miner squad has the same stats as medic but has no abilities and can only move and run.  At the start of the mission the miners are not controlled by any player. At the start of the mission determined an attacker and defender. The attacker has to eliminate the miner teams while the defender has to evacuated them by escorting the teams to their board deployment edge. One the defender is in base contact with the any miner team the can be controlled by that player. For each evacuated miner model the defender scores 1 vp. For each eliminated miner model the attacker scores 1 vp.

Score 2VPs for each Enemy Unit destroyed this Round.

Gain 1 VP for each Controlled Mission Marker.
Gain an additional 2 VPs for a Marker if you gained Control the objectfif 5.
At the end of each round, if a player has all of their Tactical Cards tapped, they lose 1 Victory Point.

additionalConditions.stringValue: Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue:
All Mission Markers are Activated.

Strategic Disruption: Each time a player scores an ennemy objective, they may choose one enemy Tactical cards.
A building affected by Strategic Disruption cannot be untapped during its controller’s next Ready Phase.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Controlled Mission Markers associated with your colour count as an Entry Edge.  You may only Deploy 1 Supply worth of units this way per round.

Gain 1 VP for each Controlled Mission Marker.

Earn +1 VP for holding (controlling) one objective, through all phases in a single round.
Earn +2 VP for holding two objectives through all phases in a single round.
Earn +3 VP for holding two objectives and the central objective through all phases in a single round.
Earn +5 VP for holding objectives and destroying more models during assault phase than the opponent.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
*Reinforcements*
2 Core Units may be placed in Reserves only after a core unit has been destroyed.

missionParams.stringValue:
All objective markers activated.
Secure and hold objectives.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to the Enemy Supply destroyed this round.

From the Start of the Second Round:
Gain 1 VP for each Controlled Mission Marker.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Assault Phase: If an Unengaged Unit is Within 3" of a Mission Marker this unit may perform the Destroy Equipment Action instead of a standard action.

Destroy Equipment Action:
Target Mission Marker Within 3" becomes inactive.
If it was associated with the Opponent colour, gain 2 VP.

Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 10+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue: All mission markers are activated.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

Score 1VP for each active Mission Marker you control this Round.

Score 2VPs if you possess the enemy active Mission Marker at the end of the Round.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Heist: If an Enemy Unit comes into base contact with an active Friendly Mission Marker, they pick it up. The Mission Marker moves with them until the last model in the unit is reduced to 0 Wounds. It is then dropped at its current location until picked up again by another Enemy Unit.

Secret Winning Conditions: The game immediately ends if a Player leads by 10+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue: Mission Markers 1 and 2 are Activated.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

Score VPs for all Gathered Gas (see below) if the gathering unit is within your deployment zone. Units that gather gas beyond your deployment zone score these VPs when they end a Round within your deployment zone.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Any unengaged unit in base contact with a Gas Geyser may spend its action (one phase each round) to Gather: 

Gather Action: Gain 1 VP.

Special Winning Conditions: This game ends immediately if a Player leads by 10+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue: All Mission Markers are Deactivated. Players place 2 Gas Geyers within 6" of their Entry Edge, and at least 18" from each other.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

From the Start of the First Round:
Gain 1 VP for each Controlled Mission Marker associated with the Opponent colour.
Gain 2 VPs for a Marker if there is an animal on base contact with a Controlled Mission Marker.

missionParams.stringValue:
All Mission Markers are Activated.
Put a 32mm base with a miniature or token of an animal on each Mission Marker. Those miniatures or tokens are Neutral and cannot be destroyed.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 10+ VPs.

Wild Xeno Fauna: If any unit (including another animal) moves within 3" of an animal, the latter will move directly away 6" immediately after the unit's movement is completed.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

Score 1VP for each Wound dealt to the Enemy Lost Unit.

Score 3VPs if you remove the Enemy Lost Unit.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Lost Unit: The unit deployed in base contact with your active Mission Marker is your lost unit. It activates like a normal unit, and may move, attack, and react normally, except that they may never be placed back into reserves.

Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue:
The Red and Blue Mission Markers are Activated.

One Unit (Supply 2 or Less) from your force starts the game deployed in base contact with your active Mission Marker.

scoringConditions.stringValue: Gain 1 VP for each enemy supply destroyed.

additionalConditions.stringValue: 10+ VPs results in immediate victory.

missionParams.stringValue:
Mission Markers are Activated.

Once per round, each player may copy and perform one Tactical Card ability from an enemy's Tactical Card load out.

Gaining control of a non-friendly mission marker grants an additional instance of the above condition the following round.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Help: Unengaged Units within 3" of the wreck may spend its Assault Phase action to help survivors out of the wreckage.

Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue:
All Mission Markers are Deactivated.
At the start of Round 3, roll a D6: on a 1-2 the Red Mission Marker is Activated. On a 3-4 the Blue Mission Marker is Activated. On a 5-6 the Neutral Mission Marker is Activated. No other Mission Markers activate for the rest of the game.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

Starting at the end of Round 3, Score 3VPs if you control the active Mission Marker.

Score 1VP for each Friendly Unit that helps the survivors.

missionParams.stringValue: All Mission Markers are Deactivated. They activate in order at the start of Rounds 2, 3, and 4, and deactivate at the start of the following turn.

additionalConditions.stringValue: Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs for every Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

Score 1VP for every Enemy Unit destroyed this Round.

Score 2VPs for each active Mission Marker you control this Round.

Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

Score 1VP for each objective you control this Round.

Score 3 additional VPs for each Core Unit you remove this Round.

missionParams.stringValue:
All Mission Markers are Activated.

At least 2 Core Units, if in the army, must be deployed on Round 1.

additionalConditions.stringValue: Special winning conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 10+ VPs.

Apprehend: When a Hero Unit is reduced to 0 Wounds, it becomes a Hero Token: it remains where it fell, and is treated as a Mission Marker. At the end of each Round, the player controlling a Hero Token may move it up to 3".

Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 10+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue:
All Mission Markers are Deactivated.

When a Hero Unit is reduced to 0 Wounds, do not remove the model from the board: it becomes a token instead.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

Score 3VPs when an Enemy Hero is reduced to 0 Wounds.

Score 2VPs for each Hero Token you control.
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round

missionParams.stringValue: All Mission Markers are Deactivated

additionalConditions.stringValue: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 10+ VPs or a Player doesn't have any units

Leadership: Friendly Units within 6" of a Friendly Hero Unit add +1 to their Supply for controlling objectives.

Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a player leads by 10+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue:
All Mission Markers are Activated.

When a Hero Unit is reduced to 0 Wounds, do not remove the model: it becomes a token for the rest of the game.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

Score 1VP for each Friendly Mission Marker you control this Round, and score 2VPs for each Neutral or Enemy Mission Marker you control this Round.

Score 2 additional VPs for each controlled Mission Marker near a fallen Enemy Hero Unit.

missionParams.stringValue:
All Mission Markers are Activated.

Each Player must field at least 1 Hero Unit.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Brutality: Hero Units may spend 1 [Resource] in any phase to gain Precision (2) on an attack they perform that phase.

Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed by a Friendly Hero Unit this Round.

Score 1VP for each Mission Marker you control this Round.

additionalConditions.stringValue: Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 8+ VPs.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

Score 1VP for each Friendly Mission Marker you control this Round.

Score 2VPs for each Neutral or Enemy Mission Marker you control this Round.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
A player wins if that player leads by 8+ victory points over all other players.
If a player has no units remaining on the battlefield or in reserves, the other players gain +5 VP and the game ends immediately, the player with the most VP wins.

missionParams.stringValue:
All Mission markers are activated.
The mission marker closest to a player's entry edge is that player's mission marker.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score 1 VP for each controlled mission marker.
Score an additional 2 VP if you control mission marker 5 or the mission marker clockwise to your entry edge.

Leadership: Friendly Units within 6" of a Friendly Hero Unit add +1 to their Supply for controlling objectives.

All Mission Markers are deactivated. 

Players must use a Hero Faction & Hero Unit.

The Player's Hero Unit gains HIDDEN as an Any Phase Passive Ability & +1 to all Stats.

additionalConditions.stringValue: The game ends immediately if a Player leads by 10+ VP.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
When a Player Destroys the Enemy's Hero Unit, gain 5 VP.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Xel'Naga Tower: Friendly units within 3" of a controlled Neutral objective gain BUFF Range 4".

Gain 1 VP if an enemy Unit is destroyed or causes any Supply to be destroyed while one of your Units is within 3" of an Objective (1–4).

missionParams.stringValue:
All Mission Markers are Activated.

At the start of each Round:
The player controlling Objective 5 selects one enemy Unit within 6". That Unit suffers 1D3 Hits.
If this effect destroys any Supply, gain 1 VP.

From the start of the first Round: Gain 1 VP for each Controlled Mission Marker.

additionalConditions.stringValue: Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a player leads by 8+ VPs.

missionParams.stringValue:
All Mission Markers are activated.

Start of Round 2: Randomly determine one active Mission Marker (1–4) and flip it to its Deactivated side. Mission Marker 5 is always active.

Combat restrictions in Shadow World:
Ranged attacks cannot target beyond 12".
Charges cannot move more than 8".

All Mission Markers are Activated.

Before Terrain Setup, starting with the Red Player, both Players take turns placing 1 Structure anywhere wholly within their respective Zones of Influence. 

Structures are Size 3. They have 20 HP and a 4+ Armour Characteristic. They have the Armored, Ground, & Mechanical Tags. Structures should take up roughly as much space as an 80mm base.

The Structure placed by the Enemy Player is treated as though it were an Enemy Unit, even though it does not Activate.

additionalConditions.stringValue: A Player wins immediately if they have destroyed the Enemy Player's Structure.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs equal to Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

Gain 1 VP for each Controlled Mission Marker.

Score 2VPs for each enemy unit that is fully destroyed this Round.

missionParams.stringValue: The Red Player is the Attacker; the Blue Player is the Defender. All Blue and Neutral Mission Markers are Activated.

additionalConditions.stringValue:
Transports: The Transports have the following stats:

Armor: 4+, HP: 5, Tags: Mechanical (Zerg: Biological), Struture

Special Winning Conditions: The game ends immediately if a Player reaches 10+ VPs.

scoringConditions.stringValue:
Score VPs for Enemy Supply destroyed this Round.

The Attacker Scores 1VP for each Wound dealt to a Mission Marker this Round.

The Defender Scores 2VPs for each Mission Marker that has not been destroyed this Round.
